name: mcu_go
description: End-to-end MCU embedded software development plugin for Codex, from requirements and hardware analysis to CubeMX generation, implementation, and GDB/OpenOCD debugging.

interface.shortDescription: STM32 firmware workflow from requirements to target debugging.
interface.longDescription: Provides a complete STM32 and Cortex-M workflow covering requirements capture, hardware interface analysis, software design, CubeMX framework setup, code implementation, and on-target debugging with GDB and OpenOCD.
defaultPrompt: Collect MCU project requirements and draft an SRS.
Analyze MCU interfaces and write a hardware connection spec.
Guide STM32CubeMX setup and review the generated framework.
